symbols.id: symbol:rule:Instruction vs. Execution Separation**: LLM dispatches and coordinates via skills/references; filesystem modifications, calculations, and hashing are handled by Python scripts (ADR-001).
symbols.name: Instruction vs. Execution Separation**: LLM dispatches and coordinates via skills/references; filesystem modifications, calculations, and hashing are handled by Python scripts (ADR-001).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Single Owner**: Only the designated module may write to its state directory (ADR-002).
symbols.name: Single Owner**: Only the designated module may write to its state directory (ADR-002).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Stateless Kernel Execution**: Event bus resides in the pipeline loop context, passed through JSON outputs (ADR-003).
symbols.name: Stateless Kernel Execution**: Event bus resides in the pipeline loop context, passed through JSON outputs (ADR-003).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Tier Merge**: Config overrides merge deep recursively: Tier 1 (defaults) -> Tier 2 (shipped defaults) -> Tier 3 (user global) -> Tier 4 (project local) (ADR-004).
symbols.name: Tier Merge**: Config overrides merge deep recursively: Tier 1 (defaults) -> Tier 2 (shipped defaults) -> Tier 3 (user global) -> Tier 4 (project local) (ADR-004).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Memory Partitioning**: Global settings, project profiles, and session variables are kept strictly separate; project profiles invalidate using fingerprints (ADR-005).
symbols.name: Memory Partitioning**: Global settings, project profiles, and session variables are kept strictly separate; project profiles invalidate using fingerprints (ADR-005).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Skill Splitting**: Decompose runtime into 8 distinct global skills to reduce context bloat (ADR-006).
symbols.name: Skill Splitting**: Decompose runtime into 8 distinct global skills to reduce context bloat (ADR-006).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Execution Contract**: Scripts take CLI flags, output JSON to stdout, print info to stderr, exit with code 0 on success (ADR-007).
symbols.name: Execution Contract**: Scripts take CLI flags, output JSON to stdout, print info to stderr, exit with code 0 on success (ADR-007).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Semantic Versioning**: Standard SemVer 2.0.0 for matching files and caches (ADR-008).
symbols.name: Semantic Versioning**: Standard SemVer 2.0.0 for matching files and caches (ADR-008).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Platform Workarounds**: LLM Router is advisory; Kernel uses global AGENTS.md rules for activation; Cost Optimizer estimates tokens via string heuristics (ADR-009).
symbols.name: Platform Workarounds**: LLM Router is advisory; Kernel uses global AGENTS.md rules for activation; Cost Optimizer estimates tokens via string heuristics (ADR-009).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Perimeter Controls**: Sandbox reads workspace + config + brain state paths only; RLS/credentials must be redacted; no file deletion allowed (ADR-010).
symbols.name: Perimeter Controls**: Sandbox reads workspace + config + brain state paths only; RLS/credentials must be redacted; no file deletion allowed (ADR-010).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Autonomous ASE-OS Pipeline**: Runs topological Task DAGs concurrently, checks resource manager constraints, implements uncertainty discovery queries, runs autonomous RCA recovery loops, and verifies the strict Definition of Done (DoD) before committing tasks (ADR-011).
symbols.name: Autonomous ASE-OS Pipeline**: Runs topological Task DAGs concurrently, checks resource manager constraints, implements uncertainty discovery queries, runs autonomous RCA recovery loops, and verifies the strict Definition of Done (DoD) before committing tasks (ADR-011).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:No file system manipulation in markdown**: Skills and references must never instruct the LLM to perform ad-hoc file operations. They must instead instruct the LLM to invoke the module's corresponding Python script (e.g., `python scripts/scanner.py`).
symbols.name: No file system manipulation in markdown**: Skills and references must never instruct the LLM to perform ad-hoc file operations. They must instead instruct the LLM to invoke the module's corresponding Python script (e.g., `python scripts/scanner.py`).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:No reasoning in scripts**: Python scripts must not attempt to reason about user intent, architect solutions, or make qualitative decisions. They are input-output machines that process data, query files, and return structured JSON/YAML.
symbols.name: No reasoning in scripts**: Python scripts must not attempt to reason about user intent, architect solutions, or make qualitative decisions. They are input-output machines that process data, query files, and return structured JSON/YAML.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:On-demand loading**: Reference documents must be kept small (under 8KB each) and focused on a single topic. The LLM must only read them when explicitly entering that specific pipeline stage.
symbols.name: On-demand loading**: Reference documents must be kept small (under 8KB each) and focused on a single topic. The LLM must only read them when explicitly entering that specific pipeline stage.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never write configurations back to the repository.
symbols.name: Never write configurations back to the repository.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Verify file permissions of configuration directories before reading.
symbols.name: Verify file permissions of configuration directories before reading.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Fail closed if a secret is found in a project-level config file.
symbols.name: Fail closed if a secret is found in a project-level config file.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Strictly validate all selected file paths against the workspace boundary.
symbols.name: Strictly validate all selected file paths against the workspace boundary.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Scan file contents for secrets before packaging; redact any matched patterns.
symbols.name: Scan file contents for secrets before packaging; redact any matched patterns.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never load files outside the active workspace.
symbols.name: Never load files outside the active workspace.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Prevent subscriber hijacking: verify module names against registered skills in Configuration before registering.
symbols.name: Prevent subscriber hijacking: verify module names against registered skills in Configuration before registering.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never pass unvalidated or raw payloads through the bus.
symbols.name: Never pass unvalidated or raw payloads through the bus.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Enforce strict typing on event payload schemas.
symbols.name: Enforce strict typing on event payload schemas.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never read files outside the active workspace.
symbols.name: Never read files outside the active workspace.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never modify the Aetheris Kernel installation.
symbols.name: Never modify the Aetheris Kernel installation.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never expose session state to other sessions.
symbols.name: Never expose session state to other sessions.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Restrict read/write operations strictly to paths starting with the approved perimeter (c:/.aetheris or workspace/.aetheris).
symbols.name: Restrict read/write operations strictly to paths starting with the approved perimeter (c:/.aetheris or workspace/.aetheris).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Redact secrets before serializing memory fields.
symbols.name: Redact secrets before serializing memory fields.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Isolate workspace memory directories: enforce file access controls so one project cannot access another's memory directory.
symbols.name: Isolate workspace memory directories: enforce file access controls so one project cannot access another's memory directory.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Plan steps must never specify execution of unsafe scripts or commands.
symbols.name: Plan steps must never specify execution of unsafe scripts or commands.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Verify that plan dependencies do not involve paths outside the workspace perimeter.
symbols.name: Verify that plan dependencies do not involve paths outside the workspace perimeter.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Plan descriptions must not contain sensitive codebase secrets.
symbols.name: Plan descriptions must not contain sensitive codebase secrets.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Every plugin must declare its requested permissions in `manifest.yaml`.
symbols.name: Every plugin must declare its requested permissions in `manifest.yaml`.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Enforce strict path checks: plugins are forbidden from calling write operations outside `<workspace>/.aetheris/`.
symbols.name: Enforce strict path checks: plugins are forbidden from calling write operations outside `<workspace>/.aetheris/`.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never load or execute plugin binaries (DLLs, EXEs) — plugins must be Python-only source modules.
symbols.name: Never load or execute plugin binaries (DLLs, EXEs) — plugins must be Python-only source modules.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never read `.env` files or files containing secrets.
symbols.name: Never read `.env` files or files containing secrets.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Redact matching key/credential patterns in any config snippet parsed.
symbols.name: Redact matching key/credential patterns in any config snippet parsed.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Validate paths to prevent directory traversal outside the workspace perimeter.
symbols.name: Validate paths to prevent directory traversal outside the workspace perimeter.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Roster recommendations must never expose internal user profiles.
symbols.name: Roster recommendations must never expose internal user profiles.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Scoring formulas must be deterministic and run in memory (no external command dependencies).
symbols.name: Scoring formulas must be deterministic and run in memory (no external command dependencies).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Strictly validate agent names to prevent command injections.
symbols.name: Strictly validate agent names to prevent command injections.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Scrub all credentials before writing logs.
symbols.name: Scrub all credentials before writing logs.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Strictly validate log file path parameters to prevent directory traversal.
symbols.name: Strictly validate log file path parameters to prevent directory traversal.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Never transmit log data over any network connection.
symbols.name: Never transmit log data over any network connection.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Verification engine must scan for credentials, private keys, and tokens in every patch.
symbols.name: Verification engine must scan for credentials, private keys, and tokens in every patch.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Verify that code patches do not read/write files outside the workspace perimeter.
symbols.name: Verify that code patches do not read/write files outside the workspace perimeter.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Code analysis must run inside in-memory parser sandboxes.
symbols.name: Code analysis must run inside in-memory parser sandboxes.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Task completion date must be in the future
symbols.name: Task completion date must be in the future

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Free accounts can have at most 10 active tasks
symbols.name: Free accounts can have at most 10 active tasks

symbols.id: symbol:rule:The script filters workspace files by relevance to task keywords, extracts public signatures from files larger than 20KB, redacts secrets, and computes token counts.
symbols.name: The script filters workspace files by relevance to task keywords, extracts public signatures from files larger than 20KB, redacts secrets, and computes token counts.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Load the selected, compressed context payload into the active LLM reasoning frame.
symbols.name: Load the selected, compressed context payload into the active LLM reasoning frame.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Invoke the memory script via `python scripts/memory.py` to read or write cache files.
symbols.name: Invoke the memory script via `python scripts/memory.py` to read or write cache files.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Store project-scoped files (cached profiles, ADR decision logs, conventions) strictly in the `<workspace>/.aetheris/memory/` directory.
symbols.name: Store project-scoped files (cached profiles, ADR decision logs, conventions) strictly in the `<workspace>/.aetheris/memory/` directory.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Append approved architectural decision records sequentially to `decisions.jsonl`.
symbols.name: Append approved architectural decision records sequentially to `decisions.jsonl`.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Validate fingerprint consistency before reloading profiles.
symbols.name: Validate fingerprint consistency before reloading profiles.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:If parsing files raises corruption errors, delete the files and trigger re-discovery.
symbols.name: If parsing files raises corruption errors, delete the files and trigger re-discovery.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Extract the primary goal and requirements from the classified user intent.
symbols.name: Extract the primary goal and requirements from the classified user intent.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Decompose the request into atomic, sequential task steps.
symbols.name: Decompose the request into atomic, sequential task steps.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Establish dependencies between steps (e.g. database schema change before frontend UI hookups).
symbols.name: Establish dependencies between steps (e.g. database schema change before frontend UI hookups).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Run check to ensure no circular dependencies exist.
symbols.name: Run check to ensure no circular dependencies exist.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Identify potential security or performance risks for each step.
symbols.name: Identify potential security or performance risks for each step.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Define explicit, measurable success criteria for every step.
symbols.name: Define explicit, measurable success criteria for every step.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Package details into the structured Execution Plan JSON.
symbols.name: Package details into the structured Execution Plan JSON.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Run the workspace scanner script via:
symbols.name: Run the workspace scanner script via:

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Parse the JSON profile returned on standard output.
symbols.name: Parse the JSON profile returned on standard output.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Conventions (naming conventions, styling libraries, testing frameworks)
symbols.name: Conventions (naming conventions, styling libraries, testing frameworks)

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Record findings and pass the Project Profile to the Memory Engine to cache in `.aetheris/memory/project-profile.yaml`.
symbols.name: Record findings and pass the Project Profile to the Memory Engine to cache in `.aetheris/memory/project-profile.yaml`.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Query the **Dynamic Registry** to get all dynamically discovered Agency and custom skills (ADR-005). Do NOT rely on static YAML files.
symbols.name: Query the **Dynamic Registry** to get all dynamically discovered Agency and custom skills (ADR-005). Do NOT rely on static YAML files.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Load the active Project Profile and Task Intent from workspace memory.
symbols.name: Load the active Project Profile and Task Intent from workspace memory.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Perform capability matching by intersecting Task Requirements with skill fields: `capabilities`, `languages`, `frameworks`, and `keywords`.
symbols.name: Perform capability matching by intersecting Task Requirements with skill fields: `capabilities`, `languages`, `frameworks`, and `keywords`.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Calculate the confidence score ($S$) for candidate specialists:
symbols.name: Calculate the confidence score ($S$) for candidate specialists:

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Select all specialists scoring $S \ge 80$. If no specialist scores above 80, default to Kernel generalist mode.
symbols.name: Select all specialists scoring $S \ge 80$. If no specialist scores above 80, default to Kernel generalist mode.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Assemble a dynamic Execution Team (1-2 specialists for Trivial tasks, 3-5 for Medium tasks, 6-10 for Large tasks).
symbols.name: Assemble a dynamic Execution Team (1-2 specialists for Trivial tasks, 3-5 for Medium tasks, 6-10 for Large tasks).

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Query `config/models.yaml` and `config/costs.yaml` to evaluate active model requirements and estimate run costs.
symbols.name: Query `config/models.yaml` and `config/costs.yaml` to evaluate active model requirements and estimate run costs.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Present the routing roster and estimated costs in the trace before execution begins.
symbols.name: Present the routing roster and estimated costs in the trace before execution begins.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Architecture Gate**: Verify code uses frameworks and styles matching the Project Profile.
symbols.name: Architecture Gate**: Verify code uses frameworks and styles matching the Project Profile.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Security Gate**: Run scanning for credentials, connection strings, SQL injection, and XSS. Halt and reject immediately on any violation.
symbols.name: Security Gate**: Run scanning for credentials, connection strings, SQL injection, and XSS. Halt and reject immediately on any violation.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Performance Gate**: Check algorithmic complexity. Warn on inefficient nested loops.
symbols.name: Performance Gate**: Check algorithmic complexity. Warn on inefficient nested loops.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Maintainability Gate**: Verify file changes conform to naming standards, include basic comments, and contain type hints if required by strictness levels.
symbols.name: Maintainability Gate**: Verify file changes conform to naming standards, include basic comments, and contain type hints if required by strictness levels.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Accessibility Gate**: Run basic checks on markup tags.
symbols.name: Accessibility Gate**: Run basic checks on markup tags.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Business Alignment Gate**: Ensure modifications fulfill the plan requirements.
symbols.name: Business Alignment Gate**: Ensure modifications fulfill the plan requirements.

symbols.id: symbol:rule:Documentation Gate**: Verify code updates documentation/readme files if new files or API endpoints are created.
symbols.name: Documentation Gate**: Verify code updates documentation/readme files if new files or API endpoints are created.
